summary: Frontend testing completed for UI fixes (Stripe logo, pricing toggle) and new Tenant Portal maintenance request feature. All reported issues are fixed and all new features work correctly.
passed_tests: Landing page - Stripe logo displays correctly in trust signals section with SVG and text label
Landing page - Pricing toggle switches between Monthly and Annual correctly
Landing page - Monthly prices: $29 Standard, $99 Pro
Landing page - Annual prices: $24 Standard (Save $60/year), $82 Pro (Save $204/year)
Landing page - 'Save 17%' badge visible next to Annual toggle
Landing page - No text overlap on billing toggle
Tenant Portal - Login with testtenant@test.com / test123 works
Tenant Portal - Maintenance tab visible and accessible in navigation
Tenant Portal - 'New Request' button has correct data-testid='new-maintenance-btn'
Tenant Portal - Maintenance request dialog opens with all required fields
Tenant Portal - Category dropdown has options: Plumbing, Electrical, HVAC, Appliances, Structural, Pest Control, Other
Tenant Portal - Priority dropdown has options: Low, Medium, High, Emergency
Tenant Portal - Title input field with placeholder 'Brief description of the issue'
Tenant Portal - Description textarea with placeholder 'Describe the issue in detail...'
Tenant Portal - Photo upload section shows 'Photos (optional, max 5)'
Tenant Portal - Photo upload has file input accepting image/*
Tenant Portal - 'Add' button visible for adding photos
Tenant Portal - Helper text: 'Add photos to help us understand the issue better'
Tenant Portal - Permission checkbox: 'Permission to enter if no one is home'
Tenant Portal - Submit Request button present
Tenant Portal - Form validation works - shows 'Please fill in all required fields' for empty title/description
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI fixes verified: 1) Stripe logo with SVG displays correctly in trust signals section, 2) Monthly/Annual pricing toggle works without text overlap. Tenant Portal maintenance feature fully implemented with category, priority, title, description, photo upload (max 5), and permission checkbox. Form validation requires title and description fields.
rca_of_issues: No issues found - all reported fixes are working correctly.
